heading: Returns relating to certain donated property
label: 6050L Returns relating to certain donated property
notes: Amendments2006—Subsec. (a)(1). , which directed the amendment of section 6050L by adding subpars. (F) and (G) and concluding provisions and substituting “3 years” for “2 years” in introductory provisions without specifying the act to be amended, was executed to this section, which is section 6050L of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. (a) required return to be made by donee and set forth contents requirements, in subsec. (b) defined “charitable deduction property” for purposes of this section, in subsec. (c) required copy of return to be furnished to donor by donee, and in subsec. (d) defined “publicly traded securities”.Pub. L. 108–357

children.label: A
children.text: the name, address, and TIN of the donor,

children.label: D
children.text: the amount received on the disposition,

children.label: F
children.text: a description of the donee’s use of the property, and

children.label: G
children.text: a statement indicating whether the use of the property was related to the purpose or function constituting the basis for the donee’s exemption under section 501.

children.heading: Charitable deduction property
children.label: A Charitable deduction property
children.text: The term “charitable deduction property” means any property (other than publicly traded securities) contributed in a contribution for which a deduction was claimed under section 170 if the claimed value of such property (plus the claimed value of all similar items of property donated by the donor to 1 or more donees) exceeds $5,000.

children.heading: Publicly traded securities
children.label: B Publicly traded securities
children.text: The term “publicly traded securities” means securities for which (as of the date of the contribution) market quotations are readily available on an established securities market.

children.label: A
children.text: the name, address, and TIN of the donor,

children.label: B
children.text: a description of the qualified intellectual property contributed,

children.label: C
children.text: the date of the contribution, and

children.label: D
children.text: the amount of net income of the donee for the taxable year which is properly allocable to the qualified intellectual property (determined without regard to paragraph (10)(B) of section 170(m) and with the modifications described in paragraphs (5) and (6) of such section).

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Terms used in this subsection which are also used in section 170(m) have the respective meanings given such terms in such section.

children.heading: Specified taxable year
children.label: B Specified taxable year
children.text: The term “specified taxable year” means, with respect to any qualified intellectual property contribution, any taxable year of the donee any portion of which is part of the 10-year period beginning on the date of such contribution.

children.heading: Statement to be furnished to donors
children.label: c Statement to be furnished to donors
children.text: Every person making a return under subsection (a) or (b) shall furnish a copy of such return to the donor at such time and in such manner as the Secretary may by regulations prescribe.
